hypothesis: Combining ATR based risk management with volatility related indicators such as Bollinger Bands (BB) and Relative Strength Index (RSI), we can identify entries that are less likely to be False signals in ranging markets.

This strategy combines the MACD and ROC with a unique volatility filter to identify trending movements in EURUSD currency pair on 1-hour time frame, where ADX indicates strong market movement, when there is confirmation of the trend (STOCHASTIC + AROON), and Bollinger band is at its maximum. The strategy enters long positions when price crosses below Bollinger middle band with high volatility and stops loss based on ATR levels and take profit targets are set using 3 times ATR above entry point.
